## Describe the bug

A clear description of what happened and what you expected to happen.

## Command used

```bash
pub search "..." --format ... --out ...
```

```
paste the full terminal output here
```

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- **Node.js version:** (`node --version`)
- **pubsum version:** (`npm list -g @decoding/pubsum`)

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or details.
